title: Renal colic follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports clinician-reviewed CT or ultrasound imaging with age and pregnancy qualifiers.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed CT or ultrasound with age and pregnancy qualifiers for renal colic follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: Renal and ureteric stones: assessment and management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with suspected or confirmed renal or ureteric stones, with age and pregnancy qualifiers.
source.setting: Assessment, imaging, procedural management, metabolic testing, prevention, and follow-up of renal and ureteric stones.
source.exclusions: Exact only for selected stone identity, imaging, stone-analysis, metabolic-workup, hydration-context, and clinician-discussed prevention documentation. Acute symptom assessment, treatment, procedures, fixed follow-up, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-reviewed CT or ultrasound imaging with age and pregnancy qualifiers.

assessment.text: Supports stone analysis, serum-calcium context, and qualified paediatric specialist metabolic assessment.
assessment.rationale: Supports stone analysis and serum-calcium context for renal colic follow-up; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Supports documenting hydration or dietary context and prevention advice only when discussed by the clinician; numeric instructions are not mapped.
